mapper.sql: bo . BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , bo.LEARNING_MODEL_ID , bo.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON , bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON , bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON , bo.BDGT_EXNS_PAMT_MCD, bo.ACIM_CON, bo.no AS outputNo , bi.*
mapper.update: UPDATE BILL_OUTPUT bo INNER JOIN BILL_LEARNING_DATA bld ON bo.TXBL_SRN = bld.TXBL_SRN AND bo.BASE_YM = bld.BASE_YM AND bo.BRCD = bld.BRCD SET bo.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(bo.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, bld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE bo.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END, bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(bld.BRCD, '-', bld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END, bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(bld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN END
